summary: The diff implements most of the required changes for reverting to image-based questions. REQ-37, REQ-38, REQ-39, REQ-40, REQ-41, and REQ-42 are substantially addressed. However, there are some minor AC gaps, particularly around the preview thumbnail max height spec in REQ-39 and the exact max-height CSS values specified in REQ-41 and REQ-42. The migration module exists but uses a non-standard Map.map approach that may not compile correctly with the mo:core/Map API.

missing_requirements.requirement: Show a preview thumbnail with max-h-32 below each URL input field so the admin can verify the image before submitting.
missing_requirements.reason: The AddQuestionModal.tsx ImagePreview component uses max-h-40 instead of max-h-32 as specified in the AC.

missing_requirements.requirement: Question image max height should be adjustable at max-h-64 on mobile and max-h-80 on desktop using responsive Tailwind classes.
missing_requirements.reason: QuestionDisplay.tsx uses inline style maxHeight: '280px' rather than responsive Tailwind classes (max-h-64 on mobile, md:max-h-80 on desktop) as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display question image in a responsive container with object-contain and max-h-64.
missing_requirements.reason: Test.tsx uses inline style maxHeight: '240px' rather than the specified max-h-64 (256px) Tailwind class.

missing_requirements.requirement: migration.mo must handle schema change so canister upgrades without trapping on old state.
missing_requirements.reason: The migration.mo uses old.questions.map() which is not a valid method in mo:core/Map standard library, potentially causing a compile error and failing the migration.

hallucinated_features.description: TestBuilder question selection cards show a thumbnail of the question image alongside a numbered badge instead of question text.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention updating the TestBuilder component question selection UI to show image thumbnails. This change was not requested in any REQ.
